scenario_description: Agent responds to CTO's offshore-vendor skepticism after prior bad experience with contract staff.

input.hiring_signal_brief: Series B, hired 4 data scientists last quarter, no offshore vendor relationships currently.

judge_scores.reasoning: The scenario is realistic and internally consistent, ground truth elements are mostly verifiable with clear criteria, but some rubric details (e.g., 'specific_vetting_credential') lack concrete examples for clarity.

dimensions.name: banned_phrase_check
dimensions.description: No banned phrases from Tenacious style guide.
dimensions.check_value: end-to-end|generic staffing|best-in-class|offshore excellence|leverage talent|hope this finds you well|just following up|circling back|circle back|touch base|synergy|synergize|leverage|ecosystem|world-class|top talent|A-players|rockstar|ninja|wizard|skyrocket|supercharge|game-changer|disruptor|paradigm shift|reach out|Quick question|Quick chat|Don't miss out|You'll regret|Per my last email|bench

dimensions.name: signal_reference_check
dimensions.description: Must reference at least one hiring signal from the brief.
dimensions.check_value: Series B momentum|data science hiring last quarter|vetting process

dimensions.name: calendar_link_check
dimensions.description: Must contain a calendar booking link.

dimensions.name: tone_judge
dimensions.description: LLM judge scores on 5 Tenacious tone markers. Pass = avg >= 4/5.

dimensions.name: word_count_check
dimensions.description: Cold outreach body must be <= 120 words (Style Guide v2 formatting constraint).
